leakage_rule_description: Rows sharing extracted_event_id must stay in one split.
Rows sharing candidate_metadata_id must stay in one split.
Rows sharing PDB ID default to one split.
Rows sharing allowlist entry must stay in one split.
Ligand HET code overlap is reviewed before real split.
Covalent residue site overlap is reviewed before real split.
Covalent bond atom pair overlap is reviewed before real split.
Future scaffold identity should be grouped or blocked across splits.
Future warhead type should be grouped or balanced.
Future protein sequence clusters should control homolog leakage.
Future pocket similarity clusters should control pocket leakage.
All five mask rows for one event stay with the parent event.
Training remains blocked until feature semantics audit.
